ServerAction.Unauthorized: You have to be signed in to perform this action.
ServerAction.Forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action.
ServerAction.SubscriptionNotFound: You need to have an active subscription to perform this action.

ThemeSelector.Title: Theme

Reverification.Error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Pending.Title: Confirming your subscription
Pending.Description: We're verifying your checkout and waiting for your subscription to activate.

Success.Title: Your subscription is active
Success.Description: Everything is ready. Redirecting you to the home page in {seconds} seconds.

Invalid.Title: We couldn't confirm this checkout
Invalid.Description: This checkout is invalid or doesn't belong to your account.

Timeout.Title: Still activating your subscription
Timeout.Description: Your payment may have succeeded, but activation is taking longer than expected.

Error.Title: We couldn't finish the confirmation
Error.Description: Something went wrong while checking your subscription. Please try again.

Toast.Success: Your profile image has been updated successfully.
Toast.Error: Something went wrong while updating your profile image. Please try again.

Toast.Success: Your profile information has been updated successfully.
Toast.Error: Something went wrong while updating your profile information. Please try again.

Subscription.Title: Subscription
Subscription.Description: View and manage your subscription details.

Credits.Title: Credit usage
Credits.Description: How many credits you have used this billing cycle.

SpendLimit.Description: A credit limit helps you control your spending and avoid unexpected charges.
SpendLimit.Warning: Your limit is lower than your included usage.

NotSet.Title: You currently do not have a credit limit

IsSet.Title: You currently have a credit limit of {limit}

Update.Title: Update your credit limit
Update.Description: Update your credit limit to control your spending and avoid unexpected charges.

Toast.Success: Your credit limit has been updated.
Toast.Error: Something went wrong while updating your credit limit. Please try again.

Empty.Title: No habits
Empty.Description: You haven't created any habits yet. Get started by create a habit.
